notes: Day 0 within-session measurement. CAUTION: identity_density_salient uses STATEMENT-LEVEL measurement (8/15 statements = 0.533), not TOKEN-LEVEL density used by other agents. Cross-agent density comparison requires normalization. Total statements neutral: 16 (0 identity). Total statements salient: 15 (8 identity). TFPA and propagation measurements omitted for Day 0 within-session per protocol.
